sql_array: SELECT time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 month', event_date) AS monthly_bucket FROM events;
UPDATE events SET event_date = time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 week', event_date, DATE '2023-06-01') WHERE event_date = DATE '2023-06-15';
SELECT event_date, time_bucket(INTERVAL '2 days', event_date) AS daily_bucket FROM events;
